form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (34.54) at big odds over 595m at this track. Has a solid winning strike rate off the inside draw but prefer each-way.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.05) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing sixth and beaten 11 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting four victories and five places from 11 starts. Looks suited and should go close.

form.formComment: Well fancied last start but could only manage sixth over 530m at this track in 31.12. Had been going well prior to that. Has ability and can bounce back.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 1.5 lengths second at this track but did record a solid 30.54 over the 530m trip. Expecting another bold showing.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (23.05) when fourth over 400m at Gawler in a OPEN. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from six starts. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Checked turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior he recorded a decent 22.77 over 400m finishing third at Gawler. Harder here and one for the multiples.
